shell.footer: Audit Platform — Enterprise audit and IFRS reporting platform

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your enterprise workspace
auth.registerSubtitle: Start with a secure professional profile
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: We will email you a secure reset link
auth.resetLinkSent: If the account exists, a reset link has been sent.
auth.verifyEmailSubtitle: Confirm your address to activate your account
auth.verifyEmailSent: We sent a verification link to {email}.
auth.verifyEmailGeneric: Check your inbox for the verification link.
auth.verificationSent: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.

onboarding.title: Set up your organization
onboarding.subtitle: Create your tenant in two quick steps
onboarding.completeDescription: Your organization and workspace are configured. You are the organization owner.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Enterprise overview for your current tenant
dashboard.statsPlaceholder: Business metrics arrive in future sprints
dashboard.welcomeDescription: Permission checks, tenant context, and navigation are active. Business modules will be added in Sprint 3.

companies.title: Companies
companies.subtitle: Legal reporting entities in your workspace
companies.emptyDescription: Registered companies in this workspace will appear here once created.
companies.errorDescription: Something went wrong while loading your company list.
companies.forbiddenDescription: You do not have permission to view companies in this workspace.
companies.noWorkspaceDescription: Select a workspace to view companies.
companies.notFoundDescription: The companies view you requested could not be found.

create.title: Register a company
create.subtitle: Set up a legal reporting entity in guided steps
create.displayNameHint: Defaults to legal name if empty
create.autosaveHint: Progress is saved locally on this device.
create.forbiddenDescription: You need company administration permission to register entities.

workspace.errorDescription: Something went wrong while loading this company workspace.
workspace.metadataDescription: Identity and record details for this legal entity.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: A calm snapshot of this company's reporting identity.
overview.highlightsDescription: Context and classification at a glance.
overview.noDescription: No company description has been added yet.

financial.title: Financial
financial.description: Reporting framework, currency, and fiscal configuration.
financial.cardDescription: Read-only view of the entity's financial settings.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.emptyDescription: Compliance tracking will appear here once engagements and obligations are configured.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.description: Finance and external auditor contacts for this entity.
contacts.emptyDescription: Primary finance and auditor contacts will appear here once added.
contacts.financeEmptyDescription: A primary finance contact has not been recorded for this company.
contacts.auditorEmptyDescription: An external auditor contact has not been recorded for this company.

history.title: History
history.description: Chronological activity and audit trail for this company.
history.emptyDescription: Activity history will appear here as changes are recorded across the platform.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configuration snapshot for this company workspace.
settings.configurationDescription: Preferences and versioning for this entity.
settings.addressesDescription: Registered and operating locations on file.
settings.validationDescription: Schema validation metadata for company settings.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure reporting, financial, and operational preferences for this company.
settings.conflictDescription: Another session changed these settings. Refresh to load the latest version or discard your changes.
settings.errorDescription: Something went wrong while loading company settings.

general.title: General
general.description: Jurisdiction, classification, and addresses for this entity.
general.addressHint: Optional — used for filings and correspondence.

reporting.title: Reporting
reporting.description: Framework used for statutory and management reporting.
reporting.groupDescription: Defines the accounting standards applied to this entity.

financial.title: Financial
financial.groupDescription: Functional currency and fiscal period boundaries.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.description: People responsible for finance and external audit coordination.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.groupDescription: Optional defaults for imports, locale, and rounding.
preferences.tradeNameHint: Optional trading name — not the legal entity name.

validation.title: Validation
validation.description: Schema validation status for company settings.
validation.readOnlyNotice: Validation metadata is maintained by the platform and cannot be edited here.

identity.title: Identity & lifecycle
identity.description: Legal identity, classification, and lifecycle controls for this company.
identity.restoredHint: See activity timeline for restore events
identity.conflictDescription: Another session changed this company. Refresh to load the latest version or discard your changes.

legal.title: Legal information
legal.description: Display and legal names shown across the workspace.

registration.title: Registration
registration.description: Official registration identifiers for this entity.

status.title: Status
status.description: Current operational status of this company.

version.title: Version information
version.description: Record versions and key lifecycle timestamps.

lifecycle.title: Lifecycle
lifecycle.description: Archive or restore this company when its reporting status changes.
lifecycle.readOnlyNotice: You need company administration permission to archive or restore companies.
lifecycle.archivePrompt: Archiving makes this company read-only while preserving its history.
lifecycle.archiveConfirmDescription: The company will become read-only. You can restore it later if needed.
lifecycle.restorePrompt: Restore this company to resume configuration and reporting.
lifecycle.restoreConfirmDescription: The company will become active again and editable for authorized users.

history.title: Activity & audit
history.description: Read-only timeline of company changes and audit summary.
history.errorDescription: Something went wrong while loading company activity.

summary.title: Audit summary
summary.description: Counts of recorded events for this company.

timeline.title: Activity timeline
timeline.description: Chronological audit trail for this company.
timeline.emptyDescription: Changes to this company will appear here as they are audited.

version.title: Version information
version.description: Current record versions and lifecycle timestamps.
